# Sitemap Implementation Plan

> **For Claude:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task.

**Goal:** Add an auto-generated `sitemap.xml` that is produced on every build, listing all pages under `https://contribfest.backstage.io`.

**Architecture:** A single `app/sitemap.ts` file uses Next.js's built-in `MetadataRoute.Sitemap` type. Next.js calls this during `yarn build` and writes `out/sitemap.xml` as part of the static export — no extra build steps needed.

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 16 App Router, TypeScript, static export (`output: 'export'`)

---

### Task 1: Create `app/sitemap.ts`

**Files:**
- Create: `app/sitemap.ts`

**Step 1: Create the file**

```ts
import type { MetadataRoute } from 'next'

const BASE_URL = 'https://contribfest.backstage.io'

export default function sitemap(): MetadataRoute.Sitemap {
  return [
    {
      url: `${BASE_URL}/`,
      lastModified: new Date(),
    },
    {
      url: `${BASE_URL}/contrib-champs/`,
      lastModified: new Date(),
    },
    {
      url: `${BASE_URL}/getting-started/`,
      lastModified: new Date(),
    },
    {
      url: `${BASE_URL}/hall-of-hosts/`,
      lastModified: new Date(),
    },
    {
      url: `${BASE_URL}/issues/`,
      lastModified: new Date(),
    },
  ]
}
```

**Step 2: Verify it type-checks**

Run: `yarn tsc --noEmit`
Expected: no errors

**Step 3: Verify the build produces sitemap.xml**

Run: `yarn build`
Expected: build succeeds and `out/sitemap.xml` exists

Inspect the output:
```bash
cat out/sitemap.xml
```
Expected output (dates will vary):
```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
  <url><loc>https://contribfest.backstage.io/</loc>...</url>
  <url><loc>https://contribfest.backstage.io/contrib-champs/</loc>...</url>
  <url><loc>https://contribfest.backstage.io/getting-started/</loc>...</url>
  <url><loc>https://contribfest.backstage.io/hall-of-hosts/</loc>...</url>
  <url><loc>https://contribfest.backstage.io/issues/</loc>...</url>
</urlset>
```

**Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add app/sitemap.ts
git commit -m "feat: add auto-generated sitemap.xml"
```
